onFileSave.prompt:
File saved: {{file}}

Call fixAllLintErrors on this file, then getDiagnostics. If any errors remain, explain them concisely.

onPostCompact.prompt: Context was just compacted. Re-orient by calling: getGitStatus (what branch/changes), getDiagnostics (any active errors), getHandoffNote (session context). Summarize in ≤10 lines.

onBranchCheckout.prompt:
Branch switched to {{branch}} (from {{previousBranch}}). New branch: {{created}}.

Call getGitStatus and getDiagnostics. Summarize what's different on this branch in ≤5 lines.

onGitPull.prompt:
Pulled {{branch}} from {{remote}}.

Call getDiagnostics to check for new errors introduced by the pull. If any errors are found, explain them concisely.

onGitPush.prompt:
Pushed {{branch}} to {{remote}}.

Call getDiagnostics (report errors only). If tests exist for any recently changed files, call runTests and report pass/fail count.

onPullRequest.prompt:
PR #{{number}} opened: {{title}} ({{url}}).

Call getDiagnostics workspace-wide. Report: error count, any new type errors, and whether the branch is clean.

onTestRun.prompt:
Tests just ran and {{failed}} failed out of {{total}}.

Failed tests:
{{failures}}

Investigate the failures and suggest fixes.

onDiagnosticsCleared.prompt: All errors cleared in {{file}}. Run the tests for that file to confirm the fix is complete.

onPermissionDenied.prompt: The tool '{{tool}}' was blocked: {{reason}}. Call getBridgeStatus to check bridge health and getToolCapabilities to confirm available tools.
